name: Web Server Spawning Shell
description: Detects web server processes spawning shell - potential webshell or RCE
query:
// Web Server Shell Spawn
// Apache/Nginx/IIS spawning bash/sh/cmd
events from endpoint
where parent_process_name in ("httpd", "apache2", "nginx", "w3wp.exe", "java", "node")
  and process_name in ("bash", "sh", "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe")
group by hostname, parent_process_name
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
